_comment: Non-Python third-party components bundled or shipped with USD Search. Picked up by scripts/_generate_third_party_notice.py via --extras. Fields: name (required), version (optional), license (SPDX or short name), homepage (URL), license_text_url (optional; fetched and saved under licenses/), sources (list of artifact tags), notes (optional, free-form).

components.name: google/siglip2-giant-opt-patch16-384
components.notes: Pre-trained vision-language model weights; exported to ONNX and served by the siglip2-triton image.

components.name: NVIDIA Omniverse Kit (kit-app-template)
components.notes: Omniverse Kit kernel + extensions used by the rendering-job and asset-graph-builder images for USD rendering and scene-graph extraction.

components.name: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server
components.notes: Base image (nvcr.io/nvidia/tritonserver:26.04-py3) used to serve the SigLIP2 ONNX model ensemble.
